instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `appendf-end` that appends a single element to the end of a list place, evaluating the new element exactly once via a hidden gensym binding.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 (COMPUTE)))
            (SETF LST (APPEND LST (LIST #:G1))))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 (COMPUTE)))
            (SETF LST (APPEND LST (LIST #:G112))))

--- stderr ---
